title: Enable DB-first provider and property retrieval with safe fallback
description: Update backend service layer so providers and properties are fetched from CRM-compatible tables when available, while preserving in-memory fallback for local bootstrap and CI stability.
acceptance_criteria: Provider and property endpoints attempt database retrieval first
Fallback to in-memory datasets remains available when tables are absent
Response metadata identifies data source mode for observability
Environment variables document table and data source overrides
